'''Anchoron''' was [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Anchoron system/Legends|Anchoron system]] of the [[Mayagil sector/Legends|Mayagil sector]]. The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Anchoroni]] were known for their flowery speech, genteel decorum, and politeness.

==History==
In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], former [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] was scheduled to give a talk against the New Order at the local [[Treitamma Political Center]]. Director of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] [[Armand Isard/Legends|Armand Isard]], hoping to rid the Empire of the troublesome politician, rigged the building to explode. While Bel Iblis arrived on schedule, the senator left the building before the planned speech to rendezvous with [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa's]] emissary [[Aach]], who informed him of the [[Death Star plans/Legends|Death Star information]] an Imperial defector was bringing to [[Darkknell/Legends|Darkknell]]. During their discussion, the Center blew up, killing Garm's wife [[Arrianya Bel Iblis|Arrianya]] and their two children. The murder of his family drove him into the arms of the Rebel Alliance. As Garm was widely assumed dead, this allowed him to operate as a Rebel agent anonymously. From Anchoron, Bel Iblis [[Mission to Darkknell (Galactic Civil War)|traveled to Darkknell]] to meet the Imperial defector.<ref name="IAD" />
